name: hyperdrive-bot
description: AI dev tools battle-tested in production. 10 plugins: branded PDFs, smoking-gun post-mortems, technical diagrams, multi-agent orchestration via Paseo, session reflection, audio transcription, Jam.dev recording analysis, auto session naming, Datadog RUM observability, and context-compaction-resilient runs.

plugins.name: post-mortem
plugins.description: Branded post-mortem PDF generator with smoking-gun evidence rigor, banned-hedging linter, and a Chrome-headless render loop that detects page overflow.

plugins.name: reflect
plugins.description: Analyze accumulated session learnings and promote recurring patterns to durable rules. Forked-context analysis returns proposals; parent conversation writes approved rules.

plugins.name: transcript
plugins.description: Transcribe audio files (mp3, wav, m4a, ogg, opus, webm, flac, mp4) to text via OpenAI Whisper API. Auto-converts opus to mp3 via ffmpeg for WhatsApp voice notes.

plugins.name: watch-jam
plugins.description: Watch a jam.dev bug recording: downloads the raw WebM via anonymous GraphQL, extracts evenly-spaced key frames with ffmpeg, and feeds them to Claude's vision.

plugins.name: paseo-bundle
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration skills for the Paseo daemon: epic (heavy-ceremony), committee (root-cause pair), advisor (second opinion), loop (worker/verifier cycle), handoff (context-rich transfer).

plugins.name: branded-pdf
plugins.description: Generate any multi-page branded PDF (proposals, briefings, executive summaries, reports) with a colors/fonts/logo wizard for brand setup. Same render-and-overflow engine as post-mortem, generic content shape.

plugins.name: diagram-design
plugins.description: Create 13 types of technical and product diagrams (architecture, flowchart, sequence, ER, state machine, timeline, swimlane, quadrant, nested, tree, layer stack, venn, pyramid) as standalone HTML+SVG with a first-run brand-style gate.

plugins.name: session-naming
plugins.description: Auto-name Claude Code sessions from conversation topic, prefix 'done-' on natural exit, and nudge /reflect every 10 sessions. Five SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/SessionEnd hooks plus a rename utility.

plugins.name: datadog-bundle
plugins.description: 8 skills for Datadog RUM observability — login (Playwright auth), sessions/errors/performance/failing-resources (REST search + analytics), watch (replay frame capture), create-app (provision a new RUM application). Org-agnostic via DD_API_KEY/DD_APP_KEY env vars or 1Password fallback.

plugins.name: resilient-run
plugins.description: Checkpoint-and-resume protocol that survives Claude Code context compaction. Writes a centralized progress file as the single source of truth so any future session (or you after compaction) can pick up exactly where work left off.
